v:ud.v:prompt: Overrides the relationship notation specifed by the IDEF1X or Relational notations.
Set to hide PK, FK, and Index annotations within Entities.
Set to Hide Primary Key section within Entities.
Set to hide Datatypes section within Entities.
Set to hide the vertical lines that seperate the Annotation and Datatype sections within Entities.
Set to hide the horizontal line that seperates the PK section from the other columns of an Entity.

v:ud.v:val: VT4(用于连接对象关系图中的各个流程。)
